task: Add the first gated live-provider adapter candidate for the Pro Rust product core: define candidate and gate-check payloads in the provider-routing crate, expose keyless API endpoints that report the candidate and denied gate state, render a compact gate-check panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Do not add provider credentials, credential vaults, live provider/search calls, auth enforcement, billing, database/Redis connections, workers, OSS runtime changes, or package dependencies.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
